name: Yogurt Mint Dip & Pineapple Relish
recipeInstructions:
Relish: Combine pineapple, mint leaves, and mustard. Process until well blended. (8 calories per 1 tablespoon)
Dip: Combine yogurt, mint, honey, and orange rind in a small bowl. Mix well. Cover and chill at least 30 minutes.
Garnish with mint sprigs. Serve with fresh fruit.
